nasb.text: He created them male and female, and He blessed them and named them Man in the day when they were created.

esv.text: Male and female he created them, and he blessed them and named them Man when they were created.

cnv.text: 他創造了一男一女。在創造他們的時候，　神賜福給他們，稱他們為人。

ccb.text: 祂造了男人和女人，又赐福给他们，在创造他们的那日称他们为“人”。

csbs.text: 神创造了男人和女人；在他们被创造的日子，神祝福他们，给他们起名为“人”。
